arts.ttl: Liverpool fan dies in Milan after he was hit by car 'while crossing a motorway at 1am', as police hunt for two others 'who fled' before their Champions League match tonight
arts.sum: A Liverpool fan was tragically killed after he was hit by a car in Milan.

arts.ttl: Rodri reveals elite players are close to 'STRIKING' over football's congested calendar... after Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson blasted the Champions League's new format and urged that stars are 'tired of being ignored'
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: The Manchester City midfielder was bullish about players being treated as commodities, admitting that the lack of rest is worrying professionals in the game.

arts.ttl: Club chief hints at tempting offer to Liverpool transfer target if he decides to stay
arts.sum: Bayern Munich director Max Eberl has suggested that midfield star Joshua Kimmich could be club captain one day if he signs a new contract to stay at the club amid transfer interest from Liverpool. arts.ttl: Arne Slot told to make 'unstoppable' Premier League star Liverpool's top transfer target
arts.sum: Former defender Glen Johnson thinks Crystal Palace star Eberechi Eze would be the perfect fit for Liverpool next summer amid doubts over Mo Salah's future at Anfield

arts.ttl: 'Again': Sky reporter spots £12.5m Liverpool player looking 'sharp' in training ahead of AC Milan
arts.sum: Sky Sports reporter Vinnie O'Connor has spotted Federico Chiesa looking very 'sharp' in training ahead of Liverpool vs AC Milan.

arts.ttl: Irish Liverpool fan killed crossing highway close to Milan
arts.sum: An Irish 51-year-old Liverpool fan died last night while trying to cross the A4 highway...

arts.ttl: ‘Very surprised’: Ian Wright says he noticed something ‘strange’ about Liverpool’s tactics vs Forest
arts.sum: Liverpool lost their first game of the Arne Slot era this weekend as Nottingham Forest won 1-0 at Anfield. The Reds were outfought and out-thought...

arts.ttl: Liverpool line-ups for AC Milan as Darwin Nunez and Federico Chiesa decisions made
arts.sum: Our Liverpool FC writers pick their line-ups for tonight's Champions League opener against AC Milan in the San Siro

arts.ttl: AC Milan want to sign £21m player but Tottenham have already agreed a deal
arts.sum: Tottenham have edge over AC Milan in the race to sign La Liga midfielder. Spurs sold Giovani Lo Celso to Real Betis in the summer transfer window. In that same deal, they negotiated that the La Liga side would have to inform the Premier League side about any bid for Johnny Cardoso.
